innovation_1.name: 三层角信号分解与几何材质分类机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that traditional EPI assumptions fail at specific physical boundaries due to the complex entanglement of geometry and material properties.

innovation_2.name: 基于几何双掩码路由的统一光场深度估计架构
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a three-layer angular signal decomposition mechanism alongside a geometric dual-mask routing architecture to systematically resolve these physical ambiguities.

innovation_3.name: 光场深度估计EPI假设失效的物理边界与根因量化分析
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate that integrating theoretical failure analysis with targeted signal routing yields a highly robust and unified framework for light field depth estimation.
